title: Datadog Design System Druids
content: Druids from Directories: Components: Druids Design System helps Datadog designers and developers build products and features that are familiar, interconnected, and highly usable. Serving as the primary UI foundation for the Datadog platform and various internal apps, Druids ensures consistency and efficiency. Datadog Design System provides essential tools, guidelines, and reusable components, streamlining the development process and enhancing the user experience across all applications. Color System Component overview Data visualization Elevation Figma Icons Layout Patterns Spacing Typography Accordion Action bar Autocomplete Avatar Badges Button Checkbox Code snippet Data table Date picker Dialog Divider Drawer Empty state Form Icon Label Link List Menus Modal Page header Pagination Popover Progress indicator Radio button Search Segmented control Select Sidebar Slider Snackbar Switch Tabs Tag Text area Text field Tooltip
